queries.feature_definition: Checking account status: no checking account.
queries.question: Empirical analysis of the impact of lacking a checking account on credit default probability and risk mitigation factors.

queries.feature_definition: Credit history: critical account or other existing credits.
queries.question: Determinants of default: The role of critical or alternative existing credit histories in reducing borrower credit risk.
Credit risk drivers: An empirical investigation into how loan duration influences default probability and risk assessment.
